Validations.SQLQuery:
WITH CommDiags AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
   dd.CommercialHCCNumber
  ,dd.CommercialHCCDescription
  ,dd.CommercialHCCVersion
  ,dd.CommercialHCCType
  ,dd.IsChronic AS HCCIsChronic 
  ,cc.AgeDOSMin
  ,cc.AgeDOSMax
  ,cc.AgeDOSDescription
  ,cc.AgeLastMin
  ,cc.AgeLastMax
  ,cc.AgeLastDescription
  ,aa.ICD
  ,aa.DisplayDescription
  ,aa.IsChronic AS ICDIsChronic
  ,ee.EffectiveYear
  ,cc.EffectiveStartDate AS XRefStartDate
  ,cc.EffectiveEndDate AS XRefEndDate
FROM ICDDataset aa
  INNER JOIN ICDEffectiveYear bb
      ON aa.ICDEffectiveYearID = bb.ICDEffectiveYearID
  LEFT JOIN CommercialHCCICDDatasetXref cc
    ON aa.ICDDatasetID = cc.ICDDatasetID
  LEFT JOIN CommercialHCCDataset dd
      ON cc.CommercialHCCDatasetID = dd.CommercialHCCDatasetID
  LEFT JOIN HCCEffectiveYear ee
      ON dd.HCCEffectiveYearID = ee.HCCEffectiveYearID
WHERE 
  ee.EffectiveYear > 2019
GROUP BY 
  dd.CommercialHCCNumber
  ,dd.CommercialHCCDescription
  ,dd.CommercialHCCVersion
  ,dd.CommercialHCCType
  ,dd.IsChronic
  ,cc.AgeDOSMin
  ,cc.AgeDOSMax
  ,cc.AgeDOSDescription
  ,cc.AgeLastMin
  ,cc.AgeLastMax
  ,cc.AgeLastDescription
  ,aa.ICD
  ,aa.DisplayDescription
  ,aa.IsChronic
  ,ee.EffectiveYear
  ,cc.EffectiveStartDate
  ,cc.EffectiveEndDate
),
FinalQueryResult AS(
SELECT
   FileId
  ,BatchId
  ,HashOfRow
  ,SourceFileName
  ,SuspectedHCC
  ,EvidenceCodeValue
  ,hcctype
  ,hccversion
  ,GapYear
  ,GapType
  ,EvidenceCodeType
FROM QueryResult qr
WHERE
FileLayoutDescription = 'ACAMemberConditionGap'
),
IdentifyGoodRecords AS(
SELECT DISTINCT 
  HashOfRow 
FROM FinalQueryResult qr
  INNER JOIN CommDiags cd 
    ON cd.CommercialHCCNumber = qr.SuspectedHCC 
      AND cd.ICD = qr.EvidenceCodeValue
      AND cd.CommercialHCCTYpe = qr.hcctype 
      AND cd.CommercialHCCVersion = qr.hccversion
      AND cd.EffectiveYear = qr.GapYear
WHERE
qr.EvidenceCodeType = 'ICD'
AND
qr.GapType = 'Historical'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT
  HashOfRow
FROM FinalQueryResult
WHERE
GapType <> 'Historical'
OR
(GapType='Historical' AND EvidenceCodeType<>'ICD')
),
Result AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
   qr.FileId
  ,qr.BatchId
  ,qr.HashOfRow
  ,qr.SourceFileName
FROM FinalQueryResult qr
  LEFT JOIN IdentifyGoodRecords igr
    ON qr.HashOfRow = igr.HashOfRow
WHERE
igr.HashOfRow IS NULL
)
SELECT 
       FileId
      ,BatchId
      ,'' AS ColumnName
      ,'IsCustom' AS ErrorCode
      ,'ICDNotMappedBackToHCC' AS ErrorDescription
      ,HashOfRow
      ,SourceFileName
FROM Result
